name: Consolidated Funding, Inc.
description_short: Consolidated Funding offers term loans, lines of credit, and hard money lending to small businesses with loan amounts ranging from $10K to $10M and online application processes.
description_long:
Consolidated Funding, Inc. operates as a small business financing platform serving United States-based companies seeking capital for various operational and growth needs. The company positions itself as a data-driven lender that leverages online technology to streamline the loan application and funding process, distinguishing itself from traditional manual underwriting approaches.

The company offers three primary lending products: Term Loans ($25K–$350K with up to 20-year repayment terms) for capital investments and expansions; Lines of Credit ($10K–$500K with up to 24-month resets) for cash flow management; and Hard Money Lending ($250K–$10M with up to 36-month terms) for emergency bridge capital secured against property at 50–75% loan-to-value ratios. All products are marketed as accessible through a single application that connects to multiple capital programs.

Consolidated Funding differentiates itself through several claimed advantages: fast online funding decisions with remote account connectivity, data integration for seamless cash flow management, flexible service selection allowing businesses to access only needed products, and security protocols that restrict company access to sensitive financial information through read-only account connections and encryption. The company emphasizes automation over manual processes as a means to accelerate approval timelines.

While the website clearly articulates its product offerings and operational philosophy, specific details regarding APR ranges, actual approval timelines, credit score requirements, and detailed terms are absent from publicly available information. The company's focus on data-driven lending and hard money products suggests it may serve businesses with limited traditional credit access, though specific eligibility criteria beyond minimum loan amounts remain undisclosed.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers high loan amounts up to $10M for qualified applicants through hard money lending products
Multiple lending products (term loans, lines of credit, hard money) in one application to match different business needs
Up to 20-year repayment terms available for term loans, reducing monthly payment burden
Claims fast online funding decisions using automated data integration rather than manual underwriting
Data-driven approach provides read-only access to business accounts for faster underwriting without storing sensitive credentials
Hard money lending available at 50-75% loan-to-value with minimal applicant requirements and fast funding
Revolving line of credit resets after each withdrawal, providing flexible access to capital
cons: No disclosed APR, interest rate ranges, or actual lending terms on public website, making cost comparison impossible
Hard money lending typically carries significantly higher costs than traditional small business loans, not detailed
Minimum eligibility requirements mentioned but not specified on website, creating uncertainty about qualification
No information about actual approval timeline despite marketing 'fast' decisions
Lack of transparent fee structure (origination, prepayment penalties, etc.) disclosed online
best_for: Small business owners needing $25K–$350K for expansion, equipment purchases, or capital investments
Companies with seasonal or variable cash flow requiring flexible lines of credit ($10K–$500K)
Real estate investors or businesses needing emergency bridge capital secured by property assets
diagnosis: Consolidated Funding is best suited for established small businesses needing $25K or more in capital for growth, operations, or emergency bridge financing who prefer online application processes and data-driven underwriting. The main caveat is that the website lacks transparency on actual interest rates, APRs, fees, and specific eligibility requirements, making it essential to contact the company directly at (888) 502-8883 or apply online before assessing true cost competitiveness.
services: Consolidated Funding Term Loans ($25K–$350K, up to 20-year terms)
Consolidated Funding Line of Credit ($10K–$500K, 24-month resets)
Online loan application and funding decision process
Bank account data integration for underwriting and cash flow monitoring
Remote account management and payment setup
One-application access to multiple capital programs
Account re-advancement options (term loan re-apply at 50% paydown)
Secure data connectivity with encryption and read-only access protocols
Cash flow management tools integrated with funding platform
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1897 NE 164th St, North Miami Beach, FL 33162
meta_description: Consolidated Funding offers term loans, lines of credit, and hard money lending to small businesses up to $10M.
